title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Pfizer India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Pfizer India
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
